criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average user ratings on popular app stores like Google Play Store and Apple App Store.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store

criteria.name: Number of Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of downloads or installs from app stores.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store, Sensor Tower

criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: Level and effectiveness of AI integration in the app's features.
criteria.sources: Expert reviews, app descriptions, developer websites

criteria.name: User Interface and Experience
criteria.description: Quality of the app's user interface and overall user experience.
criteria.sources: User reviews, expert reviews, design awards

criteria.name: Feature Set
criteria.description: Range and usefulness of the app's features and tools.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, expert analyses

criteria.name: Cross-Platform Availability
criteria.description: Availability of the app across different platforms and devices.

criteria.name: Integration with Other Services
criteria.description: Ability to integrate with other apps, services, and tools.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, developer websites

criteria.name: Innovation and Uniqueness
criteria.description: Degree of innovation and uniqueness in the app's approach to productivity.
criteria.sources: Expert reviews, app descriptions, industry awards

criteria.name: Accessibility
criteria.description: App's accessibility features and compliance with accessibility standards.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, accessibility reports

criteria.name: Privacy and Security
criteria.description: Effectiveness of the app's privacy and security measures.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, security audits
